prompt: 데이터 분석 분야를 깊이 배우고 싶어요

assertions.name: has-anchor-points
assertions.description: Output contains an 'Anchor Points' section connecting learner's existing knowledge to the domain

assertions.name: has-domain-landscape
assertions.description: Output contains a 'Domain Landscape' section with 5-7 distinct areas

assertions.name: has-priority-map
assertions.description: Output contains a 'Learning Priority Map' with prioritized areas based on the learner's situation

assertions.name: has-knowledge-gaps
assertions.description: Output contains a section identifying what experts know that the learner doesn't yet

assertions.name: output-in-korean
assertions.description: Orient map is written in Korean (user's language), not English

assertions.name: file-saved
assertions.description: A domain-orient-*.md file is saved to the outputs directory

assertions.name: concise-not-encyclopedic
assertions.description: Each area description is 3-5 sentences (map, not encyclopedia). Total output under ~1500 words.
